---
title: "Advanced"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Advanced

Deep dives for users who want to customize priors, inspect NIMBLE code, or experiment with model architecture.

[Model umbrella](model-umbrella.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Customization and tuning](customization-and-tuning.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[GPD-in-DPM architecture](gpd-in-dpm-architecture.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### Model umbrella
All-in-one examples for customized priors and multi-part workflows.
- [Model umbrella](model-umbrella.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Customization and tuning
Manual NIMBLE construction, custom likelihoods, and tuning details.
- [Customization and tuning](customization-and-tuning.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### GPD-in-DPM architecture
Prototype CRP-only architecture with GPD splicing inside the kernel.
- [GPD-in-DPM architecture](gpd-in-dpm-architecture.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::
